name: M4A1消音版 | 北方森林
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has been painted using a forest camouflage hydrographic. The woods can be a dangerous place... never travel alone
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这把武器使用森林迷彩花纹进行了涂装。 森林也许会是危险之地…… 不宜一人独往
